hero.title: Smart Agricultural Solutions for a Sustainable Future
hero.desc: At Agrika we provide integrated solutions in designing, implementing and managing modern agricultural projects, from traditional farming to greenhouses, hydroponics, agricultural marketing and specialized training, aimed at increasing production and achieving the highest return on investment with the latest technologies.
hero.tagline: Turn your idea into a successful agricultural project with us

footer.description: We specialize in agricultural greenhouses, hydroponic systems, and modern farming solutions.

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Leaders in Greenhouses & Hydroponics
about.text1: We provide integrated solutions for building agricultural greenhouses and designing hydroponic systems for maximum productivity and sustainability.
about.text2: We work with farmers and investors to deliver controlled growing environments and modern irrigation and nutrition technologies.

services.title: Our Services
services.heading: Integrated Agricultural Solutions
services.greenhousesDesc: Design and build modern greenhouses tailored to climate and production needs.
services.hydroponicsDesc: Install soilless growing systems (NFT, DWC, etc.) with operational support.
services.consultingDesc: Feasibility studies and crop and system selection for your project.
services.maintenanceDesc: Routine maintenance for greenhouses and systems to ensure continuous production.
